prompt: Create a realistic vertical fashion portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting sideways on a pale stone waterfront ledge beside a calm bay, shown from mid-thigh to head in a 9:16 crop. She wears a fitted pale sage-green ribbed knit maxi dress with thin straps and a low scoop neckline, simple gold bracelets on both wrists, and a woven straw shoulder bag partly visible behind her. Her very long dark wavy hair is blown gently by the wind over her back and shoulder. Pose her seated with knees angled forward, one hand resting on the ledge at the lower left and the other relaxed near her lap, torso turned slightly toward camera but face in clean side profile looking left across the water. Use soft natural daylight, muted blue-gray atmospheric tones, shallow-to-medium depth of field, and a serene editorial mood. Background: expansive calm water filling most of the frame, hazy distant skyline and low mountains on the horizon, pale blue sky, no readable text, no logos, no extra people. Emphasize realistic skin texture, elegant posture, wind movement in the hair, and a high-end lifestyle photography look. Use pale sage green as the main clothing color and misty coastal city bay for the environment.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical fashion portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting sideways on a pale stone waterfront ledge beside a calm bay, shown from mid-thigh to head in a 9:16 crop. She wears a fitted pale sage-green ribbed knit maxi dress with thin straps and a low scoop neckline, simple gold bracelets on both wrists, and a woven straw shoulder bag partly visible behind her. Her very long dark wavy hair is blown gently by the wind over her back and shoulder. Pose her seated with knees angled forward, one hand resting on the ledge at the lower left and the other relaxed near her lap, torso turned slightly toward camera but face in clean side profile looking left across the water. Use soft natural daylight, muted blue-gray atmospheric tones, shallow-to-medium depth of field, and a serene editorial mood. Background: expansive calm water filling most of the frame, hazy distant skyline and low mountains on the horizon, pale blue sky, no readable text, no logos, no extra people. Emphasize realistic skin texture, elegant posture, wind movement in the hair, and a high-end lifestyle photography look. Use pale sage green as the main clothing color and misty coastal city bay for the environment.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖版时尚肖像摄影，主体为 一位年轻的东亚女性，她侧身坐在平静海湾旁浅色的石质水岸边缘，画面采用 9:16 比例，展示从大腿中部到头部的构图。她身穿一件修身的浅鼠尾草绿色罗纹针织长裙，配有细肩带和低圆领，双腕佩戴简约的金手镯，身后隐约可见一个编织草编单肩包。她极长的深色波浪卷发在风中轻轻吹拂，掠过背部和肩头。姿势为坐姿，双膝朝前，一只手放在左下方的岸边，另一只手自然垂放在膝盖附近，躯干微微转向镜头，但面部呈清晰的侧影，望向左侧的水面。使用柔和的自然光，呈现柔和的蓝灰色调，采用浅至中等景深，营造宁静的时尚杂志风格。背景：广阔平静的水面占据画面大部分空间，远处是朦胧的天际线和低矮的山峦，天空呈浅蓝色，画面中无文字、无 Logo、无其他人物。强调真实的皮肤质感、优雅的姿态、随风飘动的发丝以及高端生活方式摄影的质感。使用 浅鼠尾草绿 作为主要服装颜色，并以 雾气缭绕的沿海城市海湾 作为环境背景。
